title: ✅ Why This Works:
content:
✅ Why This Works:
• Encourages students to take strategic risks.
• Ties into the RPG elements by allowing tactical play.
• Adds a tangible reward and consequence system.

🗺️ 5. Choice-Based Class Sections – The Three-Tiered System

📜 Now, students influence how the class unfolds through weekly decisions.

Three-Tiered Decision System:

✔ Tier 1 – Individual Path
✔ Tier 2 – Class Vote (Democracy in Action)
✔ Tier 3 – Instructor’s Wildcard (Chaos)

Example: Week 7 – Postmodernism & The Collapse of Grand Narratives
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 71 (chunk 71/555)
